columns.name: Year
columns.expression:
YEAR([Date])
annotation SummarizationSetBy = User
annotation TemplateId = Year

columns.name: MonthNo
columns.expression:
MONTH([Date])
annotation SummarizationSetBy = User
annotation TemplateId = MonthNumber

columns.name: Month
columns.expression:
FORMAT([Date], "MMMM")
annotation SummarizationSetBy = User
annotation TemplateId = Month

columns.name: QuarterNo
columns.expression:
INT(([MonthNo] + 2) / 3)
annotation SummarizationSetBy = User
annotation TemplateId = QuarterNumber

columns.name: Quarter
columns.expression:
"Qtr " & [QuarterNo]
annotation SummarizationSetBy = User
annotation TemplateId = Quarter

columns.name: Day
columns.expression:
DAY([Date])
annotation SummarizationSetBy = User
annotation TemplateId = Day
